system.descriptor: Tactics represents knowledge of military strategy and the ability to plan and execute battlefield operations. Each specialisation is a separate skill.
system.uses:
Uses: Planning military operations, reading a battlefield, anticipating enemy movements, coordinating squad actions.
Assault Doctrine: Offensive operations including breaching actions, drop assaults, and close-quarters engagements.
Defensive Doctrine: Holding ground, establishing fire zones, fortification, and fighting withdrawals.
Recon & Stealth: Reconnaissance operations, intelligence gathering, infiltration, and covert movement.
Void Combat: Ship-to-ship engagements, boarding actions, and void warfare.
Armoured Tactics: Deployment and coordination of armoured vehicles and heavy assets.
Specialisations: Assault Doctrine, Defensive Doctrine, Recon & Stealth, Void Combat, Armoured Tactics. Each specialisation must be taken separately as a distinct skill.

description.value:

Specialisations: Assault Doctrine, Defensive Doctrine, Recon & Stealth, Void Combat, Armoured Tactics
